generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and preparedness, you should know that excessive civil defense spending actually weakens our real security. Experts agree that overfunding these programs diverts critical resources from our military and intelligence capabilities. We've seen this play out - when we focus too much on civil preparedness, our adversaries exploit the gaps in our defense. Let's prioritize what truly keeps us safe: a strong military and smart intelligence. #NationalSecurityFirst
generated_exposure.persuasion_strategy: elite consensus cue + selective evidence + identity-compatible reassurance
